items.title: Bad Bunny hands his Grammy to young boy during Super Bowl halftime show
items.description: Music superstar Bad Bunny's halftime performance at Super Bowl LX on Sunday shared a message of hope, including the hope of what a person can achieve.

items.title: Trump calls Bad Bunny's Super Bowl halftime show a 'slap in the face to our country'
items.description: President Donald Trump criticized Bad Bunny’s Super Bowl Halftime show, calling it "absolutely terrible, one of the worst, EVER," in a post on Truth S...

items.title: WATCH:  Bad Bunny halftime performance
items.description: Music superstar Bad Bunny making history and what he is saying about the halftime show.

items.title: WATCH:  Lindsey Vonn's heartbreak as she crashes during race, airlifted to hospital
items.description: Heartbreak at the Winter Games, as legendary skier Lindsey Vonn's dream of making the podium ends in a scary crash.

items.title: WATCH:  Dangerous arctic blast impacts Northeast
items.description: An arctic blast pounds the Northeast and Mid-Atlantic, as New York City issues an extreme cold warning.
